summary: Tested global ON/OFF toggle feature for recordings in folder comparison page. Core functionality verified working: toggle ON/OFF, folder average dynamic update (n=8→n=7), excluded row opacity-40 styling. Code review confirms correct implementation across all 6 tables using shared excludedRecordings state.
critical_code_review_comments: FolderComparison.js line 63: excludedRecordings state is correctly defined as global state object
FolderComparison.js lines 66-71: toggleRecording callback correctly updates shared state
FolderComparison.js lines 682, 763, 857, 932, 986, 1049: All 6 tables correctly check excludedRecordings[rec.id] for styling
FolderComparison.js lines 94-100, 115-121: Export functions correctly pass excluded_recording_ids to backend
server.py lines 1748-1755, 1817-1825: Both Excel and PDF exports correctly filter excluded recordings
FolderComparison.js lines 147, 259, 333, 358, 391, 411, 417, 440, 465: All computed averages filter out excluded recordings
seed_data_creation: Used existing folder: 69a77a155549a8d937e5adf0 (H9 hCO + Light Stimulus with 8 recordings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global toggle feature tested and working. Toggle buttons have data-testid format: toggle-spont-{recId}, toggle-spont-norm-{recId}, toggle-hra-{recId}, toggle-hra-norm-{recId}, toggle-hrv-{recId}, toggle-meta-{recId}. Folder Average shows (n=X) where X is count of included recordings.

features_verified.toggle_on_off_button: PASS - RecordingToggle component correctly shows ON/OFF state and toggles on click
features_verified.folder_average_dynamic_update: PASS - Folder Average row updates from n=8 to n=7 when one recording excluded
features_verified.excluded_row_styling: PASS - Rows have opacity-40 class when recording is excluded (grayed out appearance)
features_verified.global_state_shared: PASS (code review) - All 6 tables use same excludedRecordings state object
features_verified.spontaneous_activity_table: PASS - Toggle button with testId toggle-spont-{recId}
features_verified.spontaneous_normalized_table: PASS - Toggle button with testId toggle-spont-norm-{recId}
features_verified.light_hra_table: PASS (code review) - Toggle button with testId toggle-hra-{recId}
features_verified.light_hra_normalized_table: PASS (code review) - Toggle button with testId toggle-hra-norm-{recId}
features_verified.light_hrv_table: PASS (code review) - Toggle button with testId toggle-hrv-{recId}
features_verified.metadata_table: PASS (code review) - Toggle button with testId toggle-meta-{recId}
features_verified.export_xlsx_filters: PASS (code review) - server.py lines 1748-1755 filter excluded_recording_ids
features_verified.export_pdf_filters: PASS (code review) - server.py lines 1817-1825 filter excluded_recording_ids

playwright_tests.toggle_on_to_off: PASS - First recording toggled from ON to OFF
playwright_tests.folder_average_update: PASS - Changed from n=8 to n=7
playwright_tests.excluded_row_opacity: PASS - 2 rows with opacity-40 class found (main table + normalized table)
playwright_tests.toggle_back_to_on: PASS - Recording toggled back to ON state

code_review_verification.shared_state_across_tables: VERIFIED - excludedRecordings used in all 6 table renders
code_review_verification.computed_averages_filter_excluded: VERIFIED - 9 useMemo hooks filter out excluded recordings

notes: Tab switching within the dialog could not be visually verified via Playwright due to Radix UI tab component structure, but code review confirms all tables use the same global excludedRecordings state object, so synchronization is guaranteed by React's state management.
